message:
refactor(server): use DbConnGuard for dashboard and readiness connections

Wrap the dashboard stats snapshot connection in guard_db_conn, replace
silent drop of stale cached dashboard connections with explicit
close_db_conn, and replace drop(conn) in readiness_check_with_integrity
with close_db_conn for consistent error-logged cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
